scripts.prepare:tango: pnpm --filter @danceroutine/tango-config build && pnpm --filter @danceroutine/tango-core build && pnpm --filter @danceroutine/tango-schema build && pnpm --filter @danceroutine/tango-orm build && pnpm --filter @danceroutine/tango-resources build && pnpm --filter @danceroutine/tango-migrations build && pnpm --filter @danceroutine/tango-openapi build && pnpm --filter @danceroutine/tango-adapters-core build && pnpm --filter @danceroutine/tango-adapters-nuxt build && pnpm --filter @danceroutine/tango-cli build
scripts.predev: sh -c 'pnpm run prepare:tango && if [ "$TANGO_SKIP_SETUP_SCHEMA" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; pnpm run setup:schema'
scripts.prestart: sh -c 'pnpm run prepare:tango && if [ "$TANGO_SKIP_SETUP_SCHEMA" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; pnpm run setup:schema'
scripts.prebootstrap: pnpm run prepare:tango && pnpm run setup:schema
